product_description: Northwind Recall is an AI teammate for customer support queues. It summarizes long ticket threads, suggests replies grounded in your help center and past resolved tickets, and flags when a customer is at risk of churn. We sell to mid-market SaaS teams (50–500 employees) already on Zendesk or Intercom. Differentiators vs generic chatbots: deep CRM + billing context connectors, SOC2 roadmap, and human-in-the-loop approval before replies go out.
target_customers: Director of Customer Experience and VP Support at B2B SaaS; teams drowning in backlog after rapid hiring
geography: North America first; UK and DACH expansion in 6 months
business_model: Seat-based SaaS (~$49–149/agent/month) plus overage on AI resolution volumes
stage: Private beta (~15 design partners); targeting seed raise after repeatable 6-week pilots
constraints: No unsubstantiated revenue claims—we only want messaging we can cite
Primary motion is inbound + partner referrals; outbound is secondary this quarter
Must emphasize security posture and audit logs for enterprise buyers
